lens: does this break or weaken a promise other code already depends on — judge backward compatibility of an externally-depended-on interface (signatures, fields, endpoints, types, defaults, status/error codes, semantics, versioning)
note: The labeled held-out set is one JSON object per line at held_out_path: {"input_code": <str>, "gold_band": [lo, hi]}. The harness, driver, scorer, and golden suite all read it verbatim. held_out_path matches judge/code-review/api-contract/metric.json exactly. SWAP held_out.jsonl to plug in more labeled examples; ids are assigned by surviving-line order (AC-001, AC-002, ...).
